---
description: Use when evaluating product scope, MVP boundaries, user stories, or whether a feature belongs in Lifeplan CLI.
---

# Lifeplan Product Skill

Read `docs/prd.md` before changing product scope.

## Rules

- Lifeplan CLI supports life planning work; it does not replace human judgment.
- Do not add financial advice, investment recommendation, tax filing, insurance diagnosis, or legal advice features.
- Keep the product focused on structured planning data, deterministic calculations, validation, explanation, scenario comparison, and export.
- If a requested feature expands scope, document it as out of scope or future work before implementing it.
